questions.question: 'Utkal Diwas', which was celebrated on 1st April 2025, marks the anniversary of the statehood of __________.
According to a circular issued by the Union Shipping Ministry in April 2025, what is the recalculated length of India’s coastline using the new methodology of calculation?
As per the India Meteorological Department (IMD), what is the approximate total annual normal rainfall received in the Thar Desert, which has a coefficient of variation (CV) of about 38%?
In December 2024, Masli, a village in which state, became the first border solar village in India?
In February 2025, the Union Minister of External Affairs and Heads of Missions from 61 countries visited Kaziranga National Park, located in which state of India?
The Deccan Plateau is separated from the Chota Nagpur Plateau by which of the following?
What is the origin of the material that makes up the Bhabar belt?
questions.option_2: Debris washed down from high ranges

questions.question: What lies between the sand dunes and the coast in the East Coastal Plains?
Which of the following coastal features in India is believed to have submerged due to tectonic or sea-level changes, as referenced in Indian mythology and archaeology?
Which of the following features distinguishes the Purvanchal hills from the rest of the Himalayan mountain system?
questions.option_1: They include the Aravalli and Satpura hill groups
questions.option_2: They form the highest peaks of the Zanskar range
questions.option_3: They stretch in a convex arc along the eastern frontier
questions.option_4: They are snow-covered throughout the year

questions.question: Which of the following is the main reason for the flatness of the Great Indian Plains?
Which of the following islands is the southernmost point of India?
Which of the following options correctly explains why the eastern coastal plains of India are wider and more deltaic than the western coastal plains?
questions.option_1: Eastern rivers flow over steep gradients
questions.option_2: Eastern plains have more tectonic uplift
questions.option_3: Eastern plains receive less tidal influence
questions.option_4: Eastern rivers form large deltas due to gentle slopes

questions.question: Which of the following rivers originates from the Amarkantak Plateau?
Which peak marks the north-western end of the Great Himalaya?
Which rivers have contributed to the formation of the Northwestern Plains of India?
Which two districts of Uttarakhand share the inter-state border with Himachal Pradesh in the north-west?
